properties.doc: JSON property name carrying the offending input field name (e.g. 'email', 'address.city'). REQUIRED on every InputError; dot-notation paths supported for nested fields.

JSON property name carrying the array of TKMessage objects describing what's wrong with the field. REQUIRED; one-or-more TKMessage entries per InputError — each TKMessage uses the spec-derived 'key'/'params' shape from contracts/tk-message.
